non_active_folders.archive/old_packages/: Old packages. Evidence only. Never treat as active unless the user explicitly asks for comparison, restoration, or rollback.
non_active_folders.archive/rejected_versions/: Rejected versions. Never active unless explicitly restored by the user.
non_active_folders.deliveries/final_outputs/: Delivery history only. Never treat as active source of truth.
non_active_folders.deliveries/zip_packages/: ZIP delivery history only. Never treat ZIPs as active source of truth.
non_active_folders.external_sources/notes/: Reference notes only. Do not treat as behavioral rules unless copied into current/source_files/.
non_active_folders.external_sources/openai_sources/: OpenAI/reference source evidence only. Do not treat as behavioral rules unless copied into current/source_files/.
non_active_folders.tests/audit_reports/: Audit evidence only. Do not treat audit reports as active rules.
non_active_folders.tests/smoke_tests/: Testing evidence only. Use for tests; do not treat as active package rules.

rules: Use current/ as the only active package by default.
Use archive/ only for comparison, restoration, rollback, or historical audit when the user explicitly asks.
Use deliveries/ only to inspect what was delivered, not as active truth.
Use external_sources/ only as reference/source evidence, not as active behavior rules.
Use tests/ only for audit and regression evidence, not as active behavior rules.
If current/ conflicts with archive/, deliveries/, external_sources/, tests/, or chat history, current/ wins unless the user explicitly overrides it.
If package_manifest.json conflicts with chat history, package_manifest.json wins unless the user explicitly overrides it.
Do not infer active status from file names outside current/.
Do not mix files across current/, archive/, deliveries/, external_sources/, and tests/ without reporting the reason.
If GitHub is unavailable, inaccessible, or not indexed, state the limitation and ask for ZIP/files instead of inventing repository contents.

chatgpt_project_upload_rule.project_instructions: Paste the content of current/instructions/Instructions.md into the Project Instructions field.
chatgpt_project_upload_rule.project_sources: Upload only files from current/source_files/ into Project Sources. Do not upload archive/, deliveries/, external_sources/, or tests/ as active Project Sources.

github_connector_rule.repository_access: Allow ChatGPT access only to the selected repository project-designer-gpt.
github_connector_rule.memory_and_chats_toggle: Keep off by default to reduce risk of mixing old chats with GitHub current/.
github_connector_rule.archive_access: Use archive/ only when explicitly requested.
